title: feature: add more metadata in agent message

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: Add network mode metadata to internal messages (fixes #13106)
similarOrDuplicatePRs.notes: Merged PR #13144 added metadata.mode='network' to network-internal messages. This PR extends that work further by adding source, primitiveId, and primitiveType metadata. They touch some of the same code sites but are complementary — #13144 added 'mode' and this PR adds 'source' plus richer provenance fields.

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix: persist modelId in assistant message content.metadata
similarOrDuplicatePRs.notes: Related work on enriching message metadata, but different scope (modelId vs source/primitiveId).

relatedIssues.title: [FEATURE] Add more metadata to agent message?

summary: Adds source identification metadata to all messages in agent networks. Introduces content.metadata.source ('user' | 'routing-agent' | 'agent-network') and consistently propagates primitiveId/primitiveType across 11 message creation sites in the network loop. Also converts the routing-agent's bare string prompt to sub-agents into a full MastraDBMessage with provenance metadata. Includes a new filterMessagesForSubAgent helper and 266 lines of tests. Fixes #11961.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community PR with good description, changeset, and comprehensive tests. wardpeet showed interest on Feb 10 ('Running tests and I'll review') but never followed up with a formal review. CI tests are stuck in PENDING state (likely because they require secrets/approval for external contributors). The Vercel deploy checks fail with 'Authorization required' which is normal for external PRs. Merged PR #13144 already added metadata.mode='network' to the same code area — this PR builds on that by adding finer-grained source tracking. The two PRs are complementary, not duplicative, but the overlap means merge conflicts are possible if the branch isn't rebased. Currently marked MERGEABLE. The changeset marks @mastra/core as minor which is appropriate for a new feature. Two bug fixes also included: primitiveId was incorrectly set to toolId in two places — now correctly uses inputData.primitiveId. The exported filterMessagesForSubAgent helper may need discussion on whether it should be public API.
